iterations.notes: First production version. Covers role-contract definition, tool matrix, system prompt body, .agent.md frontmatter rules, handoff criteria, and quality checklist. Three eval scenarios: code-reviewer (happy path), god-agent guard, and scope-repair loop.
known_gaps: No example of an agent that orchestrates other agents (delegation pattern)
user-invocable: false option not demonstrated in any example
Confirmation-threshold guidance not yet linked to a concrete example
improvements_needed: Add orchestrator-agent example showing how to delegate to sub-agents
Add second example demonstrating user-invocable: false pattern
